title: wedelia jacquinii subsp. calycina
intro: Wedelia jacquinii subsp. calycina is a subspecies of the Wedelia jacquinii plant, a member of the sunflower family (Asteraceae), native to Mexico and Central America. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antispasmodic effects. The health benefits of Wedelia jacquinii subsp. calycina include treating digestive issues, respiratory problems, and skin conditions, as well as reducing fever and pain. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make infusions, decoctions, and topical creams, highlighting its potential as a natural remedy for various health concerns.
